name: hiero-hackers
description: Marketplace for Hiero/Hedera-focused Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: agentic-support-hiero
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin focused on Hiero and Hedera: background-knowledge skills for the Hiero project and the Hedera network, a skill for deploying local test networks with the solo CLI, and the Hedera documentation and hosted Testnet MCP servers.
